privacy_note: Raw Claude session journals, local paths, agent IDs, prompt previews, and model/runtime metadata are intentionally omitted from this public artifact.

workflow.name: full-rlm-probe
workflow.summary: Full RLM trace over a corpus file handle: decompose into per-slice handles, recurse one subagent per slice, validate separately, aggregate in workflow JS.

phases.title: Decompose
phases.detail: Slicer reads the corpus handle and writes one file per @@SLICE block plus a validator handle.

phases.title: Recurse
phases.detail: One subagent reads each constructed slice handle and returns a structured record.

phases.title: Validate
phases.detail: A separate subagent reads only the @@VALIDATOR handle.

phases.title: Aggregate
phases.detail: Workflow JS filters active records, sorts by rank, joins words, and sums weights.

observed_result.validator_note: Synthetic fixture value used to verify the probe, not a credential.
